/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gen_assets_tools.dir/gen_assets.cpp.o -o gen_assets_tools  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/josue/Documents/progra2/Z-Ware/UTN-TP-juego/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.2.6.2.dylib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.2.6.2.dylib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.2.6.2.dylib
